description_long: This house features a modern, two-story design with two prominent rooftop gazebos, each supported by columns and surrounded by open terraces. The structure is characterized by a mix of curved and straight exterior walls, large vertical windows, and multiple entry points. The central section includes a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, flanked by landscaped lawns and palm trees. The exterior is finished in a combination of light and dark tones, with railings and pergolas adding architectural interest. The house is surrounded by a paved walkway and features several outdoor seating and shaded areas. The overall layout emphasizes open-air living, outdoor entertainment, and visual symmetry.
description: A modern two-story house with rooftop gazebos, large windows, and a central pool, surrounded by landscaped lawns and terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two rooftop gazebos, and landscaped lawns with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved wall, terrace, and one of the rooftop gazebos with visible outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the central swimming pool, open patio, and symmetrical arrangement of gazebos and terraces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the terrace, secondary entrance, and the arrangement of palm trees along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with double doors, small steps, and a covered porch flanked by columns and landscaping
